conservative.name: Trade Deaths
conservative.requirements: Target creature within close range dies. If you have Invocation mastery, you may instead choose a target within medium range

success.description: The target does not die. The creature within long range that is currently closest to death (as determined by the GM), other than the target, dies instead

chaosStar.description: You are the character who dies in lieu of the target

sigmarsComet.description: You choose which creature dies in lieu of the target. (Unless you trigger the effect below)

reckless.name: Trade Deaths
reckless.requirements: Target creature within close range dies. If you have Invocation mastery, you may instead choose a target within medium range

success.description: The target does not die. The creature within long range that is currently closest to death (as determined by the GM), other than the target, dies instead

chaosStar.description: You are the character who dies in lieu of the target

sigmarsComet.description: You choose which creature dies in lieu of the target. (Unless you trigger the effect below)
